items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Credit Income faces 21.9% Q1 2026 redemption requests, fulfills 5% pro rata
items.snippet: OCIC received tender requests for 21.9% of shares in Q1 2026 but fulfilled only its 5% cap pro rata; OCIC had $11.3B in available liquidity.

items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Credit Income completes $150M registration rights agreement for 7.950% notes due 2028
items.snippet: Blue Owl Credit Income Corp. executed a registration rights agreement for $150M of 7.950% notes due 2028 with SMBC Nikko, RBC, Truist, and Wells Fargo.

8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Owl Rock BDCs renamed to Blue Owl, ORCC becomes OBDC on NYSE
items.snippet: Seven Owl Rock BDCs were officially renamed to Blue Owl on July 6, 2023; Owl Rock Capital Corporation began trading as OBDC on the NYSE.

items.headline_ai: Owl Rock announces upcoming name change to Blue Owl brand effective July 6, 2023
items.snippet: Owl Rock announced all seven BDCs will be renamed to the Blue Owl brand on July 6, 2023, with no change to investment processes or day-to-day operations.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl Credit Income closes $500M of 7.950% notes due 2028
items.snippet: Blue Owl Credit Income Corp. (formerly Owl Rock Core Income) executed a fifth supplemental indenture for $500M of 7.950% notes due 2028.

items.headline_ai: Owl Rock hosts investor day to review BDC platform strategy and credit quality
items.snippet: Owl Rock hosted an investor day on May 24, 2023 covering investment strategy across its BDC complex including Owl Rock Capital Corporation.
